"2018–19 Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle 1") * Uganda   + [17–18](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_Uganda_Premier_League "2017–18 Uganda Premier League")   + [18–19](/wiki/2018%E2%80%9319_Uganda_Prem

is the 29th season of the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"), the top-tier [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") league in [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia"). The season started on 9 November 2018.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
Young Africans were expelled, with all their results annulled.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football league season

[Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 2018–19 |
| Champions | [Black Africa](/wiki/Black_Africa_S.C. "Black Africa S.C.") |
| ← [2017–18](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_Namibia_Premier_League "2017–18 Namibia Premier League")  [2022–23](/wiki/2022%E2%80%9323_Namibia_Premier_Football_League "2022–23 Namibia Premier Football League") → | |

The **2018–19 Namibia Premier League** is the 29th season of the [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League"), the top-tier [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") league in [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia"). The season started on 9 November 2018.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
